Class UIFactory

java.lang.Object
util.UIFactory
public class UIFactory extends Object
Factory class that creates pre-styled Swing components consistent with the Mizan dark theme.

All methods are static. Consumers should call these methods instead of constructing raw Swing components, so that styling is applied uniformly across every screen.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    private
    UIFactory()
    Utility class — do not instantiate.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JPanel
    createCard(int width, int height)
    Creates a fixed-size card panel with a dark background and a subtle border.
    static JLabel
    createErrorLabel()
    Creates a hidden error label styled in red, shown only when JComponent.setVisible(boolean) is called with true.
    static JLabel
    createFieldLabel(String text)
    Creates a small secondary-colour label used above input fields.
    static JPanel
    createMainPanel(LayoutManager layout)
    Creates a dark-background panel suitable for use as a main content area.
    static JLabel
    createNavSubLabel(String text, int fontSize)
    Creates a secondary-colour nav sub-label (e.g., current cycle month).
    static JLabel
    createNavTitleLabel(String text)
    Creates the large bold app-name label used in the nav bar logo area.
    static JButton
    createNormalButton(String text)
    Creates a compact normal button, used for inline actions like "Add" or "Reset".
    static JSpinner
    createNumberSpinner(int value, int min, int max)
    Creates a dark-themed integer spinner within a given range.
    static JButton
    createPrimaryButton(String text)
    Creates a primary action button with a white border outline style.
    static JButton
    createSecondaryButton(String text)
    Creates a secondary (muted) button with a filled field-colour background and no border, used for cancel or less-prominent actions.
    static JLabel
    createSubLabel(String text, int fontSize)
    Creates a plain secondary-colour subtitle label.
    static JPanel
    createSubPanel(LayoutManager layout)
    Creates a slightly lighter sub-panel, used for inner content regions.
    static JTextField
    createTextField(String placeholder)
    Creates a dark-themed text field with placeholder text behaviour.
    static JLabel
    createTitleLabel(String text, int fontSize)
    Creates a bold white title label.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • UIFactory

      private UIFactory()
      Utility class — do not instantiate.

  • Method Details

    • createMainPanel

      public static JPanel createMainPanel(LayoutManager layout)
      Creates a dark-background panel suitable for use as a main content area.
      Parameters:
      layout - the layout manager to apply
      Returns:
      a new JPanel with AppColors.BACKGROUND background

    • createSubPanel

      public static JPanel createSubPanel(LayoutManager layout)
      Creates a slightly lighter sub-panel, used for inner content regions.
      Parameters:
      layout - the layout manager to apply
      Returns:
      a new JPanel with AppColors.BACKGROUND background

    • createTitleLabel

      public static JLabel createTitleLabel(String text, int fontSize)
      Creates a bold white title label.
      Parameters:
      text - the label text
      fontSize - point size of the font
      Returns:
      a styled JLabel

    • createSubLabel

      public static JLabel createSubLabel(String text, int fontSize)
      Creates a plain secondary-colour subtitle label.
      Parameters:
      text - the label text
      fontSize - point size of the font
      Returns:
      a styled JLabel

    • createNavTitleLabel

      public static JLabel createNavTitleLabel(String text)
      Creates the large bold app-name label used in the nav bar logo area.
      Parameters:
      text - the label text (typically "Mizan")
      Returns:
      a styled JLabel at 27pt bold

    • createNavSubLabel

      public static JLabel createNavSubLabel(String text, int fontSize)
      Creates a secondary-colour nav sub-label (e.g., current cycle month).
      Parameters:
      text - the label text
      fontSize - point size of the font
      Returns:
      a styled JLabel

    • createFieldLabel

      public static JLabel createFieldLabel(String text)
      Creates a small secondary-colour label used above input fields.
      Parameters:
      text - the field label text
      Returns:
      a styled JLabel at 12pt plain

    • createTextField

      public static JTextField createTextField(String placeholder)
      Creates a dark-themed text field with placeholder text behaviour. The placeholder is shown in secondary colour and cleared on focus.
      Parameters:
      placeholder - text shown when the field is empty and unfocused
      Returns:
      a configured JTextField

    • createPrimaryButton

      public static JButton createPrimaryButton(String text)
      Creates a primary action button with a white border outline style.
      Parameters:
      text - button label
      Returns:
      a styled JButton at 160×40 px

    • createNormalButton

      public static JButton createNormalButton(String text)
      Creates a compact normal button, used for inline actions like "Add" or "Reset".
      Parameters:
      text - button label
      Returns:
      a styled JButton at 80×20 px

    • createSecondaryButton

      public static JButton createSecondaryButton(String text)
      Creates a secondary (muted) button with a filled field-colour background and no border, used for cancel or less-prominent actions.
      Parameters:
      text - button label
      Returns:
      a styled JButton with full-width preferred width

    • createNumberSpinner

      public static JSpinner createNumberSpinner(int value, int min, int max)
      Creates a dark-themed integer spinner within a given range.
      Parameters:
      value - initial value
      min - minimum allowed value (inclusive)
      max - maximum allowed value (inclusive)
      Returns:
      a configured JSpinner

    • createCard

      public static JPanel createCard(int width, int height)
      Creates a fixed-size card panel with a dark background and a subtle border.
      Parameters:
      width - preferred width in pixels
      height - preferred height in pixels
      Returns:
      a styled JPanel with GridBagLayout

    • createErrorLabel

      public static JLabel createErrorLabel()
      Creates a hidden error label styled in red, shown only when JComponent.setVisible(boolean) is called with true.
      Returns:
      a pre-configured error JLabel
